productDisplayName: Baggit Women Turnoff Taj Green Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 16 cm x 10 cmCreated from genuine leatherette with metal stud texturing on the upperOne main zippered compartment and a zippered pocket at the backA side pocket in the two fold secured with a press buttonFour card slots and a pocket on the left fold and three card slots, a pocket and a photo id slot on the rightCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
